narrative_beat: Medium frontal of modern climate-controlled P&B display case with rich ochre and gold illuminated Daniel parchment fragment, golden plaque ISRAEL ANTIQUITIES AUTHORITY

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a modern climate-controlled museum display case with a small illuminated ancient parchment fragment at its center
subject.focal_point: a heavy golden engraved plaque below the case reading ISRAEL ANTIQUITIES AUTHORITY
subject.secondary: Museum hall in P&B. Parchment in rich ochre and gold. Soft reverence.

environment.location: the Israel Antiquities Authority museum hall

composition.foreground: parchment and plaque in rich ochre and gold

lighting.rim_light: gold rim on plaque and case

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
